name: MVP - PDF Video Clip AI Podcast Composer

parameters.formTitle: PDF Video Clip AI Podcast Composer
parameters.formDescription: Upload a cover, screenshot, PDF paper, viewpoint, and background video to generate a blog-style AI podcast video clip.

values.placeholder: 可选：补充你的观点、立场、受众、想强调或反驳的内容。

nodes.name: Build PDF Video Clip Job Config

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, jobId: $json.jobId, reviewDir: $json.reviewDir, videoPath: $json.videoPath, audioPath: $json.audioPath, coverImagePath: $json.coverImagePath, screenshotImagePath: $json.screenshotImagePath, backgroundVideoPath: $json.backgroundVideoPath, pagesManifestPath: $json.pagesManifestPath, researchScriptPath: $json.researchScriptPath, narrationTextPath: $json.narrationTextPath, subtitlePath: $json.subtitlePath, subtitleTimingPath: $json.subtitleTimingPath, costPath: $json.costPath, ffmpegLog: $json.ffmpegLog, size: $json.size, audioSize: $json.audioSize, generatedScriptTitle: $json.generatedScriptTitle, generatedScriptSummary: $json.generatedScriptSummary, cost: $json.cost } }}

main.node: Build PDF Video Clip Job Config
